The '''''Avengeance''''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] employed by [[Reh'mwa]] and other Bothan radicals to locate the hidden [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. These radicals intended to use the ship to continue the policy of [[ar'krai]] and wipe out the relocated [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. However, the ''Avengeance'' was soon neutralized and taken into the custody of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].

{{Ship-stub}}
